Package org.springframework.cloud.autoconfigure

@NullMarked package org.springframework.cloud.autoconfigure
Spring Cloud auto-configuration classes.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ConfigurationPropertiesRebinderAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configuration for ConfigurationPropertiesRebinder.
    LifecycleMvcEndpointAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configuration for some MVC endpoints governing the application context lifecycle.
    RefreshAutoConfiguration
    Autoconfiguration for the refresh scope and associated features to do with changes in the Environment (e.g. rebinding logger levels).
    RefreshAutoConfiguration.RefreshProperties
     
    RefreshAutoConfiguration.RefreshScopeBeanDefinitionEnhancer
     
    RefreshEndpointAutoConfiguration
     
    RefreshEndpointAutoConfiguration.RefreshEndpointConfiguration
     
    WritableEnvironmentEndpointAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configuration for the WritableEnvironmentEndpoint.
